doc-573d0c73a0732d82c3f9b4fc98f2cfe6.content: Namaste. Let me share a fable with you, for stories are ways of immortalizing messages. Two monks, Yasmi and Nomi, are returning back to the monastery after a day of teaching in the nearby village. They were just about to cross the river when they hear a woman crying. Yasmi walks up to her and asks her what was troubling her. She needed to get back to her toddler who was living in the village across the river. Since the river had risen that day, she was feeling miserable that she would not be able to go back to her toddler, and her child would cry for her all night. On hearing her, Yasmi volunteers to help her. He carries her across the river and drops her on the other side. And they continue with their walk. About half an hour into the walk, Nomi in a very agitated tone speaks up. He says, Yasmi, do what you have done? Yasmi calmly looks at him. Our master said, Never look at a woman. You spoke to her. Our master said, Never speak to a woman. You touched her. Our master said, Never touch a woman. You carried her. Yasmi calmly looks at Nomi and says, Yes, that is true. But I have dropped her half an hour ago. It is you who still carry her. Let me take you away from this story for a bit, for a tiny experience of meditation. Please close your eyes. I still see a few sneaking a peek. It is safe to close your eyes. Inhale and exhale deep and slow. Within every exhale, raise the edges of your lips into a gentle smile. Inhale. Exhale. Inhale. Exhale. Inhale. Exhale. Inhale. Inhale. Inhale. Exhale. Inhale. Exhale. Inhale. Inhale, exhale, broaden your smile, open your eyes. Do you recognize that with a little attention to your breath and a smile to your face, you're more calm and more present? The power to peace is always within you. Let us get back to our story. Yes me and no me represent two states of being. Fundamentally, every one of us live only in two states. One is a stressful state. The other is a no stress state. We call this no stress state a Beautiful State. For that is how life feels when you live free of stress. Generally stress refers to tension. But anger, fear, hurt, loneliness, frustration are all stressful states, aren't they? Beautiful State is a state of connection, joy, love, compassion, vitality and passion. If you are not in a Beautiful State, your default state is stress. If you look at the entirety of human life, behind war or peace, cooperation or corrosive politics, love or separation, persistence or failure, finally happy children or a generation that is troubled. Behind all this is the driving force of these two states. Behind every choice and every action is the driving force of only one of these two states. So the most important choice is from which state do we want to live our life? From which state do we want to relate to the people in our life? From which state do we want to achieve and fulfill every vision of our life? Sadly, our education, entire system of a society, our parents, our religion do not bring sufficient attention to our inner state. In fact, the very structure of education at school makes us compete, makes us feel jealous of another's progress, makes us feel ashamed of being less. It is a total compromise on the essence of being human. Let us get back to our story again. Yes me represents the Beautiful State and no me represents the stressful state. No me has created a problem in his mind and is paralyzed with it. Yes me solves the problem of a fellow human being and continues with this peaceful walk. No me is agitated before the event, during the event and after the event. And his thinking becomes incredibly stupid and complicated because of his inner agitation. Yes me while in action is fully present. And once the action is complete, his departure from the situation too is total. In a Beautiful State, there is no compulsive rumination of the past or anxiety over the future. al. In a Beautiful State, there is no compulsive rumination of the past or anxiety over the future. It is a state where you experience inner simplicity and the brilliance of an uncluttered mind. It is a state where you are connected to the present. No me is lost. In a stressful state, you are lost. You are disconnected from the others. You might be amidst people, but yet feel lonely. Yes me is different. He is connected to the lady's plight. He helps her. He understands no me's distress and tries to help him out with a wise remark. In a Beautiful State, you are powerful enough to help yourself and help others around you. You are outright intelligent. And your actions are decisive and powerful. Let us observe no me a little longer. Anger and confusion have mounted over his ideals of duty and virtue. In my observation, when a stressful state mounts over your ideals, however lofty they are, whether they are of patriotism, unconditional love, duty or honesty, we become insensitive and indifferent. We hurt the very cause we served and we hurt the very people we love. Yes me helped not because he would be barred entry into heaven. Definitely not. Nor did he help not because he would feel guilty if he hadn't helped. He helped because he was able to feel the lady's pain. He was able to feel her suffering. Actions in a Beautiful State arise from a place of connection, not from an ideal. Actions in a Beautiful State. There have been times when we have been yes me. There have been times when we have been no me. We have lived in stress and disconnection and caused greater confusion in our own lives and lives of people around us. We have lived in a Beautiful State of connection and contributed to the well-being of ourselves and people around us. In the house. War, division and conflict of every form can only end when more and more of us live in a Beautiful State. So the big question is. How do we break free of our habitual negative bias of our brain toward stressful state. If pressure is going to be a part of life, how do we live life without being bogged down by stress? How do we address numerous challenges of our life living in a Beautiful State? There are three well-trodden paths people usually take. One, we live in stressful states and plummet into hurting inner states. Two, we try to escape stress. We try to achieve a temporary dopamine high. However, when the dopamine plateaus, we are left feeling emotionally dry and empty. Three, we try replacing inconvenient beliefs, stories and ideas into more convenient ones. The problem, however, is none of these three parts have the power to get you off the gravitational pull of suffering or long-term stress. And we succumb back into the vortex of habitual stressful emotions. We need a greater inner power to get us to a Beautiful State. And that is the way of inner truth. About eight years ago, we as a family met with an accident while at Big Bad Lake in California. We emerged safe from the accident. But while in the waters, Sri Krishnaji, my husband, co-founder of One World Academy, realized the root cause of all human suffering. He saw what kept suffering alive for days, months and years after a stressful event was over in anyone's life. Past and present circumstances, other people and their behavior can trigger stress in us. But they do not keep us chained in our unhappiness. While in the waters, he saw the true reason for humanity's suffering. He saw all emotional suffering arising from obsessive, self-centric thinking. It is a total preoccupation with oneself. It is a total incessant preoccupation with oneself. And it is this preoccupation that separates you from the other. It is this preoccupation that is responsible for war, conflict and division of every kind that we see in the world today. This truth can be inconvenient for us. But if we can observe our emotional suffering in the light of this insight, then this truth can liberate us. This truth can set us free. uffering in the light of this insight, then this truth can liberate us. This truth can set us free. In suffering, in unhappiness, in stressful states, you are preoccupied with yourself. We are preoccupied with injustice done to us. We are preoccupied with pleasure that was denied us. We are preoccupied with opportunities that did not come our way. We are preoccupied with love that was withheld from us. It is a total preoccupation with oneself. And in this state, we are not concerned with finding solutions to the problem at hand. For the entire thinking is only me, me, me, me, and me. That is all we think in unhappiness. Let us observe Nomi in the light of this insight. Throughout the story, he is preoccupied. He is preoccupied with his rightness. He is preoccupied with his guilt at having allowed a wrong to happen. He is not concerned about the situation, nor is he concerned about the lady and her son, nor his friend. He is constantly justifying within himself that he was in ignoring the suffering woman. And that he was great in following the rules. Realizing that all lingering in suffering is a total preoccupation with oneself. It is an obsessive, self-centric thinking. It is the most powerful antidote for any form of suffering that could have gripped you. When you see it, not only you walk out of stressful states, but there is a great release of energy. doc-444b7ced4a1f5d30530f670a6783a327.content: Hello and welcome to Frankly Speaking. Today we have a very special guest, Mukthi Guru, Sri Sri Krishnaji, co-creator of Ekam, World Center for Enlightenment. Namaste and welcome to Frankly Speaking. I want to ask you, your mission at ACAM has always been a better world for everybody, for individual and collective transformation. Shri Sri Krishnaji, what do you mean by this transformation? Human beings today are in a race for survival. In the middle of all of this confusion, how do you encourage people to undergo a personal transformation? Navika Ji, first of all, thank you so much for having me on the show. Individual transformation is at the crux of our work. For collective transformation to happen, we focus a lot on individual transformation. And what does this individual transformation mean? It means that we are teaching people to live in states of great compassion and great oneness, which are enlightened states. So we want people to live in these states so that collectively they can impact humanity's consciousness. Our vision for the world is to create 81,000 people in this world, which is 0.001% of the population, who can learn to live in these great states. Great states of compassion and great states of oneness. Now, we as a humanity are connected. We are not separate, but we are connected. And when we, when an individual transforms, that individual transformation is impacting the collective. So today, science speaks about how we are all one field of consciousness., even in the physical world, we are all connected. Matter and energy, they are not separate. They are connected. In the same way, our consciousness is connected to the entire humanity's consciousness. So our vision is to bring about this individual transformation where an individual is able to live in these states, in this great enlightened states of great compassion and great oneness. The concept of ACAM or oneness that you are talking about. How does an individual me feel and experience this oneness? We have our work pressures. We have our family pressures. We have our home pressures, friends and a fast moving world around us. How would you make somebody me experience this oneness? How do I go about it? See, if not for oneness, we are talking about a world that is not feeling one. Today, I know I meet so many people and everybody asks me this question. We are not able to feel this connection. We are not able to feel this one. Be it within a family, be it within a work culture, be it between nations,. So if not for this feeling of oneness, we will be experiencing hell if we don't feel one. So if we don't feel one with our family, if we don't feel one with our fellow neighbors, if we don't feel one as nations, then what we are experiencing is a lot of separation and a lot of division. Let's talk about family. Now, when you come to families, we clearly see that this seeking for feeling one is very, very strong. But yet, that is not happening in families. In today's families, most of the time, people are feeling separated. People are feeling disconnected. People are feeling hurt. People are feeling that there is no sense of belonging. They are not experiencing that one. And the result of that is the children who are part of the family are experiencing a tremendous amount of disconnection, a tremendous amount of pressure, stress and anxiety. And we see their lives as they grow up moving into more problems, more problems of disconnection, more problems of not able to feel connected. Loneliness. Loneliness, depression, anxiety, all these are growing. And these are all growing because in the family, there is no sense of oneness. If you come to the human body, for example, human body is a great example. Now, our human body functions in a state of oneness. All the 30 trillion cells are communicating with each other. The enzymes are communicating with each other. 30 trillion cells are communicating with each other. The enzymes are communicating with each other. The hormones are communicating with each other. The organs are communicating with each other. As this communication is happening in a state of oneness, you are in good health. When this communication breaks down, let us say that this communication is not proper and it is not in a state of oneness, then what the human body experiences is sickness. Oneness is the nature of the universe. Oneness is the nature of everything that is existing. Everything is in a flow. Everything is in a harmony. And when a disturbance happens, problems set in. So oneness as a state is very important for individuals and family members. So in the family, when we talk to individuals, what we find is that an individual is unable to feel connected to the family because of his or her anxiety, his or her stress, and more importantly because the person is a broken mirror. So when we talk to an individual, we find out that,, a human being is so many pieces of a broken mirror. And what are these broken mirrors? What is this broken mirror? This broken mirror is different voices. Voice of a mother saying that,, live according to values. Voice of the father, which is saying, go after ambition, become successful no matter what. Voice of the grandparent, which is saying, live a simple life, don't be so ambitious. Voice of social media, which is celebrity voice, which is saying,, live them. So there is this constant struggle of trying to be something else from who you are. Constant dissatisfaction with what you have, with who you are, and constantly wanting to get somewhere else. Unless and until all these broken mirrors come together and you heal and you feel one within you, there is no way you can be present to anything in life. You cannot be present to the work you are doing. You cannot be present to your family. And as leaders of nations, you cannot be present to the nation itself. So oneness is that state where you are able to heal, heal your hurts, heal your anger, heal your fear. And you are able to be present and connected to everyone that you are coming in touch with. So how do you do it? So how do you do it? The point is, when we have an active working life, how do we disconnect from all this and begin to do this? How does ACAM help people to do that and get into that form of oneness where we can have different, as we say, different notes of music and make it into a harmonious tune? How do we do that? See, first of all, we should understand that the oneness we are talking about is not an ideal. It's not a world where we are seeing everybody agreeing upon the same ideology or same idea. That's not the oneness we are talking about. The oneness that we are talking about is the inner state. Now, this inner state, you can get there by practicing simple meditations. You can get there by going through a spiritual journey. We have thousands of people who come to our courses, to our ACAM campus. And they give two weeks in a year. That's it for a journey. And they see massive transformation happening in them. Again, it is about healing yourself. It is about bringing these broken mirrors together and making it into one beautiful mirror. That can happen if you have the passion to do it. If you have the conviction that, yes, I need the spiritual journey. I need to heal and I need to spend this time for myself. If you're clear about it, then the journey can begin. Your work also involves bridging the gap between science and spirituality. I just want to know how do these two domains intersect to become one entity for you to promulgate. Science and spirituality, for many people, is different. And for many, they're trying to bring it together that one is not contradictory to the others. How do you propose to do it? In fact, science and spirituality are getting close very much today.. How do you propose to do it? In fact, science and spirituality are getting close very much today. In fact, I think if you look at history and if you look at the present time, science and spirituality are agreeing on many things and coming together on many things. Now, science, if you look at science, science and technology has given human beings things to live with. Science and technology has not given human beings what to live for. So, today, if you look at all the youth, youngsters and everybody, we have got lots of things to live with. We have gadgets, we have watches, we have shoes, we have different kinds of clothing, homes, cars, everything. But the biggest question is, with all this, what am I living for? Purpose. The purpose. Now, that question can only be answered by a spiritual awakening. Only when you awaken in your inner world can you discover what are you living for, even unfortunately today. Human relationships. It's about whom do I want to live with. It's not about what do I want to live for in this relationship. It's about, no. So, science and technology is giving the answer for the external, which is to live with things, but it can never give you an answer for. Live for. Live for. Now, if you look at science, and science is today clearly telling us that the human brain is capable of living in this amazing enlightened state. And there's a lot of science, there's a lot of studies that's going on on human brains. So, fundamentally, our human brain has five brain modes. And science is doing these studies. And these five brain wave modes are called beta, alpha, theta, delta, and gamma. Now, when your brain is pulsating at a beta wave mode, it is pulsating between 14 to 30 cycles per second. Now, in beta, there is beta and high beta. Now, scientists call this beta brain mode as a monkey brain mode. So, when your brain is pulsating at these cycles, you lack attention. You lack focus. You lack connection. You cannot be present. And you're constantly thinking about something. So, you can never be attentive to something. And the memory capacity also is very less. When your brain is in high beta wave mode, it becomes a brain which is obsessively thinking about the same thing again and again. So, you will come across people who are unnecessarily worrying a lot, who are very anxious, because they're thinking the same thing again and again. Now, you can change that from beta wave mode to alpha mode, which is when your brain is pulsating between 8 to 13 cycles per second. Now, when your brain moves to alpha mode, you become more attentive. You become more focused. You become more focused. And your memory is far better. Then you're present to people. Now, when your brain moves from alpha to theta brain mode, where your brain is pulsating between 4 to 8 cycles per second. Your brain is becoming a mystical brain. Your brain has become a mystical brain. Your brain has become a transcendental brain, where you are now capable of experiencing beautiful enlightened states. You are experiencing states of calmness, states of being present. And you are becoming an antenna, which is also accessing the universal intelligence or the divine. You are able to allow that universal intelligence to flow into you. Your brain is in that mode where it can access that intelligence. When your brain moves to delta mode, which is 1 to 3 cycles per second, that is when you are sleeping. So, that is not so important. Then scientists have recently discovered the low gamma and the high gamma brain mode, where your brain is pulsating from 40 to 40. 60 cycles per second in low gamma mode. Here, you are awakening to compassion. So, when your brain is in this state, you are feeling connected to the other. You are feeling one with the other. And this eye-centricness is diminished. And you are feeling other-centricness. the other. And this eye-centricness is diminished. And you are feeling other-centricness. And when your brain moves to high gamma mode, which is 60 to 80 cycles per second, you are experiencing states of oneness. So, this is scientifically proven that these states impact the brain and the brain in turn impacts these states. So, it is possible to live in these states today. So, today science is saying that these states are possible. Probably in the near future, science will be, it will be possible for science to induce these states into humans. Make it happen. Well, you also say in your teachings, and you just spoke about the fact that meditation is one way to get into this. Yes. So, meditation, mindfulness, how can these practices help individuals navigate the challenges of the modern day?, we are all in our age group, people who are working, who have high pressure jobs, etc. What role does meditation play? How does an individual get into that? And what is the way to meditate?, all these studies that are being conducted now, most of them are conducted on meditations. And through meditations, they are seeing that the brain is changing. So, you can start with a simple practice called soul sync practice that thousands of us seekers across the world do it. It is an 11 minutes practice. It changes your brain from beta to alpha state. So, it makes your brain more calmer. It makes your brain more attentive, more focused. It is just for 11 minutes. But it is a practice. Just you remember to eat every day, you must remember to meditate. And you must know the importance of meditation. That it changes your brain. It changes your state. It makes you much more sharper and more intelligent. Now, mindfulness for me, we have a five stage path that we have laid out for people to reach from where they are today to enlightenment. But I would not to go into all those five stages now, but I will go into the first two stages. The first two stages are one becoming conscious and two becoming aware. So, today if you looked at the world, you will see that most of the people are living in a state of unconsciousness. They are not conscious about what they are doing. The first stage in anyone's journey for transformation is to become conscious. What are the words I am speaking? What are the actions? Are my actions hurting or are my actions uplifting somebody? If you can become a conscious individual, that is your first step towards transformation. The second step is to become aware. This is a very important thing because this is mindfulness. Awareness means what is the inner state you are functioning from. When you are talking to your wife, when you are talking to your husband, when you are talking to your children, to your colleagues. What is your inner state? So, I have given this very important teaching to the world that human beings, all human beings, irrespective of your religion, race, gender, age, class, nationality. We all only live in two states of being. A Suffering State and a no Suffering State. That is how we experience our life. And what is a Suffering State? Suffering states are states of anxiety, stress, anger, fear, jealousy, disconnection. These are all suffering states. When you are experiencing these states. Negative energies. Negative states. Exactly. When you are experiencing these states, you are conflicted, you are confused, you are frustrated, you are irritated, you don't know what should I be doing next. These are suffering states. In no suffering states, you have the beautiful states and the enlightened states. Beautiful states are states of gratitude, calm, peace, love. So, when you are hurt, you dissolve your hurt, you move to love. When you are angry, you dissolve your anger, you move to peace. These are beautiful states. And then you have enlightened states, which are oneness and great compassion. are beautiful states. And then you have enlightened states, which are oneness and great compassion. Today, human beings are asking, what am I doing? But more important is, what is the state from which what I am doing? If you can move to a Beautiful State and live your life from that state. Imagine you are relating to a child from a Beautiful State. You are relating to a partner from a Beautiful State. You are relating to your colleagues from a Beautiful State. World leaders are relating to each other from a Beautiful State. Imagine what will be the outcome of it. It will be oneness,? It will be feeling of one. It will be feeling of appreciation. It will be feeling of respect. It will be a feeling of connection. Without that state, if you are going to, you could have good behavior., inside you can feel anger, but outside, hello sir, how are you? You can say that. But deep within, you are not in that state. So, state is the most powerful thing. Because that is who you are. You are living there. That is the power. So, I tell people that if you want a great life, if you want a fantastic life, where everything is meaningful, everything is abundant, then you must learn to live in a Beautiful State. Otherwise, whatever you might have in life, you will still not appreciate it. I meet so many youngsters every month. I go around colleges giving talks and meet them. I would say 95% of them have come up to me and said, Sri Krishnaji, we are stressed. We are anxious. We don't know what we are doing with our lives. Where is the world going? What is happening? Can you please help us? Can you please guide us? They are from very renowned, fantastic universities. I think we have to teach our youngsters how to live in this Beautiful State. How do I not burn myself out? Why should I live my life with stress? Why should I live my life with anxiety while there is a way to become free of it? While there is a way to learn and live in a Beautiful State? I think that importance must come. If that comes, I think then we are building a great future. Let me also ask you, what role does harmony with nature play in this quest for oneness, in this quest for liberating ourselves from the stress and the daily pressures that we live in? See, nature plays a very important role. In fact, our campuses are around beautiful, it is surrounded by mountains and forest. We have 300,000 square feet of, 300,000 acres of forest around our campuses. And then people come there and they land on the campus and they say, I am feeling a sense of calm. I am feeling a sense of silence. So the impact is immediately there. But if you want to take it a little bit more deeper, we have to understand that we and nature are one., the ancients have said that, Annam para brahma svarupam, which means if you take rice in a spoon and start contemplating on how that rice landed on your spoon and really understand that the whole universe has gone in making that happen., the sun's rays, the light of the moon, the mother earth soil, the air, the water, the farmer's hard work, and at the end of the day, your mother cooking and bringing it onto the table. So it's everybody's effort and nature's effort that has gone into making that spoon of rice come to you. If people can even contemplate, let's say, once a day, if not even once a day, even once a week, that this spoon of rice that I'm going to have now, the whole universe has gone into making this, then you will awaken to this terrific understanding of how nature is playing such an important role in your survival. We have a foundation. In fact, we are just not talking about philosophy, but also we put into action. So Loka, my daughter, has started a foundation called Loka Foundation. but also we put into action. So Loka, my daughter, has started a foundation called Loka Foundation. And,, I took her, me and Prithaji, my wife, we took her when she was seven years old to this orphanage called Udhavam Karangal in Chennai, because we wanted her to feel and see, feel and meet these children. And when she met this very young children, very, very young, who were 14 days old, two months old, three months old, who do not have parents, it touched her very deeply. And we came back home that evening and she told me, in Telugu, we call Nana, Nana means dad. Dad,, I want to do something for these kids because they don't have what I have. And she took up the responsibility at the age of seven to take up life sponsorship for 100 kids. And she fulfilled it that she fulfilled that in three years time. And from the age of seven to ten, she used to come to programs and stand on stage and raise funds for this initiative. At the age of nine, I took her to a village next to Acom and there she saw children so happy. Everyone came to her, held her hand, played with her, talked to her. And the impact that she had was that these children are so happy that their physical world, which is not really in a great shape, that should not take away their happiness. That should not take away their joy. So I want to do something. So she started Loka Foundation, which is now building five world village projects. And all these villages are built on the concept of sustainability. So the village themselves create mud bricks. They don't use cement and steel. They use all the local materials from the village. They are the people who are constructing. They do everything and they're building their homes. And these are communities who are scheduled tribes. And their homes were with walls that were two feet height. And when it used to rain, water inside the house and they used to live outside the house. So today they have beautiful homes and all are sustainable homes. And we are teaching them. Loka said human beings first, infrastructure next. So the first thing we taught them all was connection with nature, connection with Mother Earth, connection with the trees. And every villager learned to appreciate how important the forests are, how important the birds are. And after that happened, over a period of six months, we went inside and started building these villages for them. And we are now helping. It's completely eco-friendly, sustainable villages. Let me also ask you, Shri Sri Krishnaji, forgiveness is a very profound concept in many spiritual traditions. Yet, how can forgiveness heal personal wounds and contribute to reconciliation? Because this is not just about individuals. It's also across the society, it's across nations that we need to build this way of life where forgiveness comes in and reconciliation. Because standoffs really are the negative state, as you mentioned, that human beings are in. See, there is nothing forgiveness. Okay? Forgiveness is just an ideal and it doesn't work. If forgiveness is such a great successful concept, then the whole world must be a better world. So I hurt you, you hurt me and we each say, okay, we forgive each other and walk off. But it's not happening. We are holding on to our hurts and we are taking time to teach the other person a lesson. So forgiveness is not happening. What needs to happen is a healing. A healing has to happen. So when a person is hurt, that person must heal from that hurt. Only after healing from that hurt, forgiveness is something that's automatic. I will give you a great example that Shri Sri Preethaji was doing. Shri Sri Preethaji was invited to a very important mission in Colombia, in the country Colombia. that Colombia had 60 years of civil war. True. Yes. And a person from Harvard University who is a Colombian came to one of our courses and was deeply moved and deeply touched with the work we are doing. bian came to one of our courses and was deeply moved and deeply touched with the work we are doing. So he put up an event called Peace in Your Eyes. For the first time, he brought the guerrilla warfare people, the paramilitary people, the political leadership, the civil society and the press. All of them together in a jungle in Colombia where Shri Sri Preethaji was invited. This program was put for Shri Sri Preethaji for two days. Where all of them had to see into each other's eyes. They were not looking into each other's eyes and forgive. So Shri Sri Preethaji led them through a beautiful journey of healing. A healing happened. And at the end of the event, everybody could look into each other's eyes, talk and hug each other. For the first time, it was so heavily guarded that Sri Preethaji was telling me that when she was going to the restroom, there was an armed man with a gun walking, guarding her. That is how armed it was. One month later, one guerrilla leader was interviewed in a local channel. And he said, I was once again invited to take up arms. And I was told, let's hurt back. And I told my people I can't do it after I attended. Peace in your eyes. I am healed. My hurt is over. I don't have that hurt anymore. I am a healed human being. I cannot touch arms again. I cannot kill or hurt somebody again. I will not do it. So that is the power of healing. That is the power of transformation. When you really find freedom from it, not manage it or not escape from it, you are a changed person. Very well said. Very profound. You have dedicated your life to spiritual teachings, humanitarian work. What do you think you would want to leave in this world as your legacy? See, if you look at today's youth, it is very sad. I meet them and most of them are tremendously disconnected, lost, stressed out, anxious about the future. Now, when you start talking to them, you realize that all this has happened because it starts off in the family. There is a lot of stress, anxiety and disconnection in the family. And the Hiranya Garbha now... if you want to understand Hiranya Garbha you need to read the Rig Vedas. It is called The Cosmic Womb... that is the source of creation. This Hiranya Garbha started to give me again experiences and I had a very personal Divine connection with the Hiranya Garbha and my parents... they are the founders of Oneness movement... Shri Amma and Shri Bhagwan! And I used to study in my father's school... so this entire work began in that school and... my father then asked me a question... he said... now that you're having this Divine communion in your heart... will you be able to transfer this? Can we try transferring this to someone else? And that is when... being an 11-year-old boy, I said it's fine, I can do it. So that is when the Diksha Phenomena... the Diksha Phenomena is where I was able to transfer this Divine sacred energies into another... started off... and this is now present across 100 nations with millions of Diksha givers who give Dikshas for various different reasons... but one of the primary reasons for this Diksha is... for one to get in touch with their Divine in their heart. So we call this as 'Antaryami' or Personal Divine. So let's say you are a believer in a particular God... you can awaken to that Divine experience in your heart... through this Diksha. So that was the gift and that is the gift I still have and I continue to do Dikshas all around the world wherever I go and I help people. Also through Dikshas, healings happen... and also through Dikshas, people experience... Transcendental Mystical States! So that is what Diksha does. But most importantly Diksha is... when I give Diksha, it's the Divine flowing through me and... the receiver who's receiving the Diksha is receiving the... Divine within him or her. So that's the phenomena! Amazing! I have been here at the Ekam Center since 2 days... incredible experience with the meditation and the programs... and you definitely feel connected to a higher Divine energy... I want to ask you about the... Hiranya Garbha energy that you've consecrated at the Ekam temple... What happens... What is the transformation that occurs to people... when they walk into Ekam. Ekam is designed for... people to experience a very powerful connection with their Divine. It is also designed for people to experience a deep sense of calm and connection. ith their Divine. It is also designed for people to experience a deep sense of calm and connection. So if you fundamentally see human beings, they're very disturbed within. That is true! There's lot of stress... There's lot of struggle within... and... constantly human beings are searching for some hope... Hope for a better relationship... Hope for better family... Hope for better finances, better jobs. So Ekam is designed where that can manifest for you... but all that starts off with an internal change and a connection with the Divine. Now Hiranya Garbha is the consecrated object in the center of Ekam. What is Hiranya Garbha? Hiranya Garbha is... for me it's a symbol of Oneness. So in the Rig Vedas, our ancient sages and saints... who lived in India... 10,000 to 12,000 years ago... have documented their experience of this creation of this universe. So they had this question within them... How did this creation come into existence? And they had this mystical transcendental experience... where they saw this entire universe came into existence from a small tiny golden being... and they named it the Hiranya Garbha. Hiranya means Gold, Garbha means the Womb. So Cosmic Womb! So this entire creation is from that Cosmic Womb. So now we see Science! Calling this entire phenomena as a Big Bang Theory... where Science tells us that... this entire universe came into existence from a small tiny golden being and it exploded... and you see the universe today. So the theory is that... the Universe either contracts or expands. So now we are in an expansive universe... the universe is still expanding! So everything that you see and don't see... is part of the Hiranya Garbha... Everything... the birds, the trees, you, me, air, fire, earth, everything... Consciousness... Divine... Stars, the Sun, the Moon... everything is part of this Hiranya Garbha. So it is a symbol of Oneness. It is to understand that... we are all one, we all came from one source... and... fundamentally we are one and that's what even Science today tells us... Quantum Physics tells us that we are all one fabric of Consciousness. So that's the beauty of Hiranya Garbha and center of Ekam... and it's the only place in the world where... you can come and connect to Hiranya Garbha and the beauty is... when you are connecting to the Hiranya Garbha... you can connect to the Divine that you believe in... because that's the Divine that will manifest... because Hiranya Garbha represents everything. So there is nothing you have to believe in a particular Divine... Whatever you are comfortable with... Whomever you have been praying to... you can comfortably connect to that Divine by sitting in the presence of Hiranya Garbha and that connection deepens, strengthens and you have a very real experience of that Divine. That is so beautiful and this is one of the very beautiful things that I experience whenever I... at most of the places, spiritual centers in India... that the focus is on spiritual upliftment... it's never religion or follow this path... there is no rigidness. So that's what I really love about spiritual centers here in India especially... So is there any Mystic secret around Ekam... something that... we cannot see as people... that some mysticism that's operating on its own. See, for me Ekam is just not a structure. It is a place which is... very living... it is a structure which is... having tremendous amount of... one can call it Divine energies... Mystical energies... that is why as you step into Ekam, you move into that space of calm... and you get that hope, yes, my life is going to change. Now when I created Ekam... that was the intention behind creating Ekam... that when people step in, it becomes effortless for them... it's no more effort... that they're automatically transported to a different world... they're automatically transported to this place where they are connecting to themselves... world... they're automatically transported to this place where they are connecting to themselves... they're connecting to the source... and they're able to have a great life. Now how that happens is... Ekam's energy changes your energy. So the architect who designed Ekam... he's just not an architect but... he's also a Vastu expert and... he was heading... the Research Department in Aurobindo Ashram and I worked very closely with him. I was 20 years old when I started to create Ekam and... Poddar ji was, I think, 52 years old. So we joined together and we did this. So he brought in lot of knowledge and wisdom... from the sacred Indian scriptures. One of the most important things for Ekam is the ground it sits on... so there is a way to measure energies from Mother Earth and when he started to measure the energy where Ekam is sitting on... the energy emitted from there, from the ground... is running into billions of units. They measured this energies through a Lecher Antenna. It's... I think it's a German technology and... Poddar ji was trained in measuring. So he can measure the Earth's energy... he can measure the tree's energy... he can measure your energy. So normally when he goes to a home or when he goes to some place and starts to measure... these units stop in somewhere in the range of 100 units or 1000 units and... the antenna stops to move... but when poddar ji came to select the land... where Ekam is sitting... the Lecher Antenna did not stop moving. It moved and moved and moved and he's, "I'm here for many minutes now and it's not stopping"... so it's already touched billions of units. So he was telling me that... in his vast experience... he has traveled all over the world... in the context of his research and he said, "Something this I only witnessed in South America" So this is probably the second or third site in my life, where I'm seeing that... the energy emission is just not stopping. And then of course there are a lot of other Vastu principles that have gone into making Ekam and then after Ekam was built... he came again for measuring the energy and the energy shot up into trillions of units... he was there for 20 30 minutes... and the Lecher Antenna didn't stop. So yes Ekam has that power... Ekam has that powerful mystical energy in it and as you walk in, you are transported and your life changes! Amazing! So I want to also mention Amma Bhagwan here... My aunt has been telling me about Amma Bhagwan ever since I was in school and I've been listening to... How devotees who have been followers of Amma Bhagwan... have experienced Healing, Miracles, Awakening... such Divine spiritual experiences. You are the only son of Amma Bhagwan! How did your perception to life change... being born to Amma Bhagwan... and experiencing all of this around you? I think luckily for me it started to happen at a very young age, rather than when I'm 30 or 40 years old. So the movement began when I was 11 years old. So... I think to be in that flow from a very young age... I think was part of life... It was not a shocker. And I think my parents also made sure that it was not a shocker for me... it was all very normal for me. So I was part of the movement from a very young age and the Diksha Phenomenon began from me and I would definitely say that both my parents made sure... that my life is for people! They always used to say that... it's very very important to serve people and that is where true Joy is... True fulfillment and joy comes in serving. So being part of the spiritual lineage... part of the spiritual experience... part of the work growing... it has never been a shocker, it's rather been a very natural experience for me. I would say if I was not doing this... then probably it would have been a shocker... but it's been quite a natural experience and... I think I'm getting deeper and deeper into this... and this will be my life moving forward and will always be my life. deeper and deeper into this... and this will be my life moving forward and will always be my life. For people who are watching us from different parts of the world... who probably physically cannot walk in here and be here... How can they connect with you? Is there a way to experience the Diksha Phenomena maybe online... or through online program? Absolutely! We have online programs... There is a program called manifest... which Shri Preetha ji does... it's a 12 month long journey and... each month, it's for 3 hours... you can sit at your home and... you can go through this journey and... you will receive a Diksha from Shri Preetha ji and... if you're a manifest member... you also receive a Diksha from me... which is all online. So I do Diksha initiations twice a year. I just did one a month ago... where we had I think more than 6,000 to 7,000 people participate from all over the world. So yes I do this continuously and... we do it in our programs and... you can happily get the initiation from your home. I believe you have created a program for entrepreneurs and Senior Business Leaders & organizations... What is that all about? It's a program that's going to be a journey in... creating enlightened leaders and enlightened achievers. Both Shri Preetha ji and I are focused on creating powerful transformed leaders for this country and that transformation now has to happen within. We are of course witnessing a lot of transformation outside... through new systems, new technologies... so many new things are happening outside... but within us we are still that same old human being. Yes! That needs to change. So we want to create this new human being within... and that new human being will be an enlightened achiever or an enlightened leader. So it's going to be a 5day program and... it's going to be twice a year that I will be doing... it'll be 10 levels... that I'll be taking people through a journey... and in this journey you are going to learn to handle your challenges... learn to handle your problems without fear, without anger, without hurt... and you'll be also able to clearly differentiate problem and suffering. So now when a problem is there... a challenge is there... leaders tend to move into anxiety, stress, irritation and frustration. Now how do you handle those challenges without those states... how do you handle it from a beautiful state... how do you handle it from calmness... how do you handle from... total clarity & courage... So that is immense strength and... when that happens, your brain changes! Today science says... the more beautiful your state, the more intelligent is your brain. So we definitely need... for challenges a more intelligent response... which means the leaders have to learn to be in that calm state. So this program is going to give leaders that strength, that inner strength... and that inner Clarity... which will in turn transform their mind and their brain... and then make them handle these challenges effortlessly and move forward their businesses, grow their businesses... and always have that competitive edge over others to be very successful. Incredible! See, whenever I meet leaders, I tell them... I meet leaders all over the world... and I tell them that for me there are two worlds... one is the outer world and the other is the inner world... both co-exist together, they run parallel... but the whole world is now focused just on the outer... they're really not focused on the inner world... but the true sense of power, the true sense of... that fulfillment achievement all happens within you. So inner world also needs addressing and if that inner World grows, if that inner world transforms, then amazingly the outer world starts to make more sense... it starts to be more joyful. So that's the journey I want to take all these leaders and everybody on and we're going to call this program: Oneness Achievers... so that ultimately they're able to be in the 're going to call this program: Oneness Achievers... so that ultimately they're able to be in the state of Oneness and achieve what they want to achieve. When will this program begin? November 2024. And is it an online application? No you need to come here to this campus. And you need to be here with me for 5 days. So it's also a part of the Diksha program. Yes Diksha will be part of the program. Diksha will be a part of the program. But that program will be wisdom, meditations and... Awakening your Consciousness or awakening your state of being to access that universal intelligence which is present around us. See, for me Divine is intelligence and this intelligence is present everywhere and how do you access this intelligence? Everything is accessing intelligence,? So how do you access it? You access this when your state changes... when your inner state becomes more beautiful, you are able to access this intelligence, be in connection to this intelligence and use this intelligence for growth, for breakthroughs, for solving your problems and moving forward. So this program will be focused on that. So... there are a lot of people who have questions on Karma and how Karma operates... how many different layers does karma have and how does karma really operate in people's lives? See, the second you are conceived in your mother's womb, you are a karmic being and... that's why they call this bhoomi as Karma Bhoomi. So karma is a law for me. More the law of gravity. So the law of gravity... is universal for everyone. Whether you jump here or someone jumps in Alaska or someone jumps in China or New Zealand... you have to fall down. It's a universal law, it's applicable to everybody... irrespective of who you are, what you do, you cannot escape this law. In the same way karma is a law that no one can escape and... Karma is energy that flows into your life... dependent upon the actions that you have performed in this lifetime... also the actions that you have performed in your previous lives. It's also an energy that's flowing into you dependent upon the actions your parents have performed... your grandparents have performed... we call this as the soul circle... which is your parents, grandparents, uncles, aunts, all of them... and it goes for three-four generations. So all those energies are flowing into you in this life and then of course there is Nation's Karma... there is humanity's karma... one of the classic examples that I give people... is the Bad Karma that Humanity experienced. Everyone experienced this Covid. All of us were made to sit inside our homes... We had to wear masks... We could not come out... So the entire world experienced Covid in the same way. So there was no discrimination at all. Everybody had to follow the rules... Everybody had to do things in a particular way, from the leader of the Nation... to the person who is living in that country... Everybody! So no exceptions! So that's how Karma works. So that's a classic example of Humanity's Karma. But on an individual level... your karma is... manifesting as problems, as health issues, as relationship issues, as divorces... so many ways... Now I strongly believe that you can beat this. At least you can reduce the impact of your negative Karma to a large extent and the answer to that is in your state. It's in your inner state of being. Okay! So the more you can learn to live in a beautiful state and move towards Enlightenment... then there is this massive hope of beating that negative Karma to a large extent and creating Good Karma and having a great life... because every one of us we are here on this planet ultimately to live in that beautiful state. We go to our jobs to find happiness... We earn money to find happiness... We have children to find happiness... We get married to find happiness... We have friends to find happiness... So everything human beings are doing... ultimately is to find the joy and happiness... happiness... So everything human beings are doing... ultimately is to find the joy and happiness... but unfortunately it's not happening. So the answer is definitely not in the outside... the answer is inside you, it's within you. So when you can awaken to that and... when you realize that I'm here on this planet... ultimately to find that fulfillment, that peace and joy... and I want to take the journey... in finding that... when you have made the choice and made the decision... then strangely these karmas change because now you have discovered your ultimate purpose on this planet... and then you are moving in the direction of transformation... you are moving in the direction of change... and then somehow strangely this negative Karma... that had to impact you in a massive way, doesn't impact you in such a massive way... and you start creating positive Karmas. So it's a law but one can say, you can... navigate this law very beautifully, as you learn to navigate your inner State. Shri Krishna ji one question here... A lot of us... because I also do astrology podcasts... so a lot of us... suffer because of 'Pitru Dosh' because of probably the bad karmas that our ancestors did... knowingly or unknowingly... we also suffer because of Vastu Dosh... the land... the Vastu is separate, it's the house... but sometimes the land is so negative and we are blissfully unaware that we're living on a land which is so negative and it starts affecting people... it starts affecting their relationship... their health... and then sometimes... it's the matter of even finding the person to guide you... How to find the person? What pujas have to be done? Sometimes we are also misguided. So is there a way to overcome all of this... without getting into very technical things... Puja or Havans or something that? See, Pujas, Havans all these are very important... they do help you and... I would say this is science... from our great ancestors... So fire is this powerful element... which definitely has the power to clear negative energies... so homa ceremonies all are good... but as you said... finding the Homa for you, finding the person who can do the Homa for you, who can do the Vastu correction for you... all these are challenges... in this complex world and... but these energies are true... the Vastu energies, the Homa energies, the ceremony energies... all these do help... but in my... meeting people... talking to people... I see that though they have done the Vastu corrections... though they have done the Homas, the ceremonies... their problems are still never ending and the suffering and pain is still never ending... so I would say that... these problems and challenges are part of life in this complex world and one of the ways... I will more focus on how to solve them... and how not to get beaten up by them and... be walked on by them... but rather solve and keep moving forward in life... for that you need a strong inner state... so ultimately I tell people do all this... but all these are again external... whatever you're doing again is external... also there's a powerful inner solution and that inner solution is to live in that beautiful state. So work on your state... that's very very important and strangely when you work on your state... and when you are moving to the beautiful state... then all these energies have a very different impact on your life. Somehow they're enhanced at 100 times more... the impact of these energies are far more powerful... so you should do your rituals from a beautiful state, you should do your Havan from a beautiful state, you should correct your Vastu energies from a beautiful state and learn to handle these problems and challenges from a beautiful inner state. If you can do that then definitely... the impact of negative Karma can be reduced to a large extent... can be minimized... not zero but I would say if the impact is supposed to be 100%... arge extent... can be minimized... not zero but I would say if the impact is supposed to be 100%... definitely it can be brought down by at least 80%. So all these programs that you have created,, the 'Soul Sync'. All of them will help to elevate us our Consciousness? Soul Sync is a meditation that Shri Preetha ji has created and it's a meditation daily practice that one has to do... we are also a lot into science... so we have studied that brain... has to change... for you to have these powerful states and the Beautiful experience of life. So... brain has different brain modes, one can call it... starting from Beta, High Beta... then you have Alpha... then you have Theta, Delta, Low Gamma, High Gamma... So this is what the scientists have now discovered. But most of the time human beings are living in beta and high beta... which means your brain is pulsating... roughly between 40 to 30 Cycles per second in beta and 30 to 49 cycles per second in high beta... so that means you're very worried... you're very stressed because there's no focus, there's no concentration... memory power is less... so the brain has to change. So what soul sync does is... it changes your brain from Beta High beta to Alpha... so when your brain moves to Alpha mode, your brain is now pulsating between 7 to 13 cycles per second... which means you calm down, you become more focused, your concentration levels have increased, your memory has increased, everything has changed... so Soul sync meditation is that scientific meditation that... changes your brain. So I give this meditation to all human beings and... specifically to youngsters who are going to school colleges... and are into sports... because they need that attention and that focus... And we see remarkable remarkable... results... there was this young guy who is now playing for Karnataka... he's a cricket player... and he came to me and he was not able to score more than 30 or 40 runs... and he asked, "Krishna ji, what should I do?" So I said do the soul sync meditation. So he went back, did the soul sync meditation... and next day he scored 120 - 130 runs and he sent a message saying thank you so much... because he was able to be calm... when he was batting. So it changes your brain. So it'll be wonderful if people can do this, it's only 12 minutes a day... Best is to do it twice a day... once after you wake up and before you go to your bed. Otherwise at least once a day minimum and it changes your brain. So I'm here at the abundance festival and there are people from all over the world... it's so beautiful... I want you to also tell my viewers about this abundance Festival... how can they be a part of it from all over the world? And it's thrice a year? It's three times a year. So one is Abundance Festival... it is a three-dimensional journey and the festival is totally focused on wealth creation... See, whether we all it or not, the truth is every one of us want wealth... everybody is seeking for more money... bigger bank balance, more savings and everybody wants to have a great life... they want to enjoy life, go out for holidays, travel, eat... and for all this, we need wealth. So Shri Preetha ji and I created this festival for that purpose because... when we meet a lot of people personally... their desires they share is... we want more wealth... we want a better home, we want a better car... so we discovered that... we said let's do an abundance Festival that will help make this happen. So the way we do it is, it's very unique Festival because here you are given the gifts of abundance... but at the same time you're taken on a path where your sanskaras are cleansed... so sanskaras are traits that you acquired during this lifetime and traits that are flowing from previous life and also traits that you acquired from your parents when you are conceived and as you grow up... so for example, let's say... you were bullied in your school... are conceived and as you grow up... so for example, let's say... you were bullied in your school... now you could have forgotten about that bullying... but you could have become a person who has lost confidence... you could have become a person who's unable to make decisions... unable to be in a group, unable to talk... unable to come on stage and present anything... because you were bullied... and that bullying has had a deep hurt or deep injury in your heart... and you're not still healed... so that pain is there in your Consciousness and that act of bullying, that incident, can manifest itself in various different forms... as you're going to a job... as you're starting your business... as you getting married... so... it can be very painful journey. So it's called a samskara... so you have to become free of the samskara... in turn to really achieve great things in life. So we go into 15 different samskaras and... we also give 15 different abundance gifts to you... so relationship is a gift, wealth is a gift, health is a gift, that we go into 15 different aspects of life and... they are given as gifts to you in Ekam because Ekam has that power and... Shri Preetha ji & I are present there and... we make sure that you go through a particular process... so that you receive these gifts and when you go out in the world, you are able to have these gifts in your life. So that's the Abundance Festival... it is totally focused on wealth creation and it is totally focused on you having a great life externally. And how many days is this course? Six days! So you have to be here for 6 days... if you're out of India... you should make your plan accordingly. Thank you so much for this wonderful interview and... you have created this beautiful center... I really want people to be a part of it, especially I... from what I have experienced, this is a very perfect place for... people from different countries who are curious about... India... being connected spiritually... gaining spirituality... through this country... I think it's a beautiful Center you have created. Thank you so much! Thank you so much for coming here, it was wonderful talking to you and you should come to one of our programs. I definitely will! I'm honored, thank you so much! Wonderful seeing you, Namaste! Namaste!

I n t r o d u c t i o n
By Preethaji
As I open the doors and walk onto the veranda, I feel the crispness of the air turn
moist. The breeze brings the scent of the wet earth from afar. Two large dark
clouds gather overhead, unburden themselves, and go their way. Water is owing
from the roof into puddles in the garden. A frog croaks loudly and another
answers; soon there is an orchestra of them. My senses are exploding with
delight. Bliss is pouring into me from all sides before subsiding into a state of
deep calm. My CFO calls from Los Angeles to discuss our upcoming meditation
app. The inner stillness continues through the conversation . . . and the words
ow.
Why does life not always seem so eortless?
Why are deep, rich, and fullling moments in our relationships so few? Why
is progress on our climb to achievement so slow and the obstacles so great? Why
is happiness so eeting? We feel a ash of joy when we see our children smile,
when we embrace our loved ones, when we hear applause for a job well done.
Why does our elation fade so quickly, only to be replaced with anxiety, worry, or
doubt?
For thousands of years, human beings have sought answers to these
questions. We have pursued countless strategies for awakening to a more
beautiful existence. We have worked hard on honing our skills, mastering
ancient disciplines and trendy hacks alike.
But has all this strategizing brought us any closer to the lives we dream of? Or
is it just yielding temporary results?
To be sure, there is nothing wrong with a tactical approach. But our goal is to
help you go beyond the mediocre and awaken to a power that is much greater
than any technique you can master—a power that will enable you to create a life
of great prosperity and great love. You need only unlock it.
It is the power of a transformed consciousness.
To put it another way, we’re not talking about retraining the mind or
embracing better habits; we’re talking about nothing less than transforming the
way you experience reality. The way you experience yourself. The world around
you. Everything.
Think about that for a moment.
What would it mean to experience life in a completely dierent way? To feel
as if new parts of your brain have been activated and revved up? To see
opportunity where you only saw obstacles? To sense that nally time and
fortune are on your side?
What would be possible with such a powerful consciousness?
If you are like many of the people we’ve met in the past three decades, you are
hungry for such knowledge. Thirty years ago, my in-laws, Sri Bhagavan and
Amma, founded Oneness, a spiritual organization dedicated to helping
individuals move from survival to living, and twenty years later, my husband,
Krishnaji, and I founded One World Academy, our own philosophy and
meditation school for transforming consciousness.
It has been two years since my in-laws handed over Oneness to Krishnaji and
me, and we have since then merged these two great organizations to create O&O
Academy. Our curriculum has helped thousands of people nurture relationships
free from hurt, create achievements free from aggression, and live free of fear. It
has taught them how to move from separation to connection, division to
oneness, stress to calm—and, in so doing, transform themselves as individuals
and as members of families and organizations.
O&O Academy is not an ashram for settlers, but rather an organization that
engages its students in dynamic learning. You take what you learn here and you
apply it to everyday life. We oer courses for teens, young adults, families,
spiritual seekers, conscious wealth creators, and leaders who want a
“consciousness upgrade.”
Many initially come to Krishnaji and me for exactly the kind of strategic
advice I just wrote about, but it doesn’t take them long to realize that all
strategies pale in comparison with the insights and the magic that unfold in their
lives as a result of awakening to the sheer power of consciousness.
Think of this book as a guide to unlocking the awesome potential of human
consciousness. Tragically, most of us have never been taught to tap into this deep
source of wisdom. No wonder we spend so much time plotting and planning for
happiness or achievement as if they were guests who can never be convinced to
stay for a cup of tea!
In the pages that follow, we will share with you four sacred secrets, which will
attune you to the great power of consciousness. Each secret is followed by a life
journey designed to set you free of all that is preventing you from realizing your
dreams, from accessing expansive states of consciousness, and from truly
connecting with your loved ones.
The great reward of a transformed consciousness is that you will come to
experience a way of being in the world that Krishnaji and I call a “beautiful
state.” From such a state, life feels joyful and eortless. Opportunities start to
ow into your life with ease. Random strangers become friends and supporters.
Help comes to you at every step of the journey. No more do you nd yourself
feeling stuck. Your intuition is awake.
The insight at the heart of this book is simple enough: there are only two
states of being, a suering state and a beautiful state. One state creates an energy
eld of chaos around you. The other welcomes harmonious happening into
your life. Therefore, the most important choice any of us can ever make is “In
which state do I want to live?”
But this idea also presents a question: Once we make the choice, can we walk
around in a beautiful state all the time?
No, we cannot. A choice alone is not enough. We must rst understand that
suering states are often unconscious and deeply ingrained. They took root in us
either epigenetically, prenatally, in our early childhoods, or even in our later
years.
Our suering states prevent us from feeling this sense of wholeness, calm, joy,
and courage. But they can be overcome.
If we don’t learn to free ourselves from suering states, they’ll come back
time and time again until our baseline mood is sadness, irritation, or anger. From
such wounded places, we cannot create lasting happiness, relationships, or
wealth. Even if we use our frustration to drive us forward, our accomplishments
bring us little lasting satisfaction. Or, even worse, our rise to the top comes at
such a steep price that we nd ourselves asking: Was it even worth it?
At that point, meditation, chanting, or vacations can feel like tossing ice
cubes into a volcano.
We need more than balms; we need transformation.
We have coauthored this book to share our own experience of the power of
the beautiful state as well as the experiences of students of ours who have
transformed their lives from the inside out in every aspect, from building lasting
relationships to creating satisfying and successful careers. We have deliberately
changed the names, country origins, and backgrounds of these students to
preserve their privacy while maintaining the authenticity of their insights and
experiences of transformation.
As these stories reveal, if you are curious about transforming your
consciousness, you will discover a greater sense of eortlessness in living, loving,
and achieving. Once you begin to hold these sacred secrets close to your heart,
the universe becomes a loving friend, supporting you with magical
synchronicities that power you along the way.
Let’s start this journey together.
But before you begin, we would like to make a suggestion: Do not rush
through these pages. The Four Sacred Secrets is a book that you will want to
return to again and again. It will speak to your soul. The truth behind these
words will reveal itself to you more fully with each passing day. You may want to
read sections as part of a daily meditation practice or carry the book around with
you to help you nd clarity during life’s many daily challenges. Make it your
own by jotting down notes, questions, and reections as you read it. Each time
you come back to these words, they will have a new lesson to oer.
Pause to reect on each concept. Take note of any feelings or insights that
arise, as well as any coincidences that occur as you awaken to the power of
consciousness.
